summary: Proof-worth registry entries owned by the generic visual harness.

entries.contract: The AOS visual harness contains generic URL, canvas, diagnostics, and bounded-command primitives without product launch composition.
entries.worth: This prevents shared visual helpers from absorbing external product behavior.
entries.guard: static shell units with fake or no AOS command

entries.contract: Shared harness guards fail fast and release cleanly.
entries.worth: This prevents visual helper composition from leaving hidden daemon or canvas state behind.

entries.contract: The generic visual harness rejects stale or missing active content roots and permits explicit warning mode without product-owned root assumptions.
entries.worth: This catches worktree/content-server drift before a visual proof silently exercises stale bytes.
entries.guard: fake AOS command only; no daemon, canvas, native input, or TCC
